query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS australian_standards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  standard_code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('electrical', 'plumbing', 'structural', 'roofing', 'fire_safety', 'accessibility', 'general_construction', 'safety', 'energy_efficiency') NOT NULL,
  trade VARCHAR(50),
  version VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '2024',
  edition VARCHAR(50),
  effective_date DATE DEFAULT (CURRENT_DATE),
  summary TEXT,
  key_requirements JSON,
  applicable_states VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'ALL',
  supersedes VARCHAR(50),
  source_url VARCHAR(500),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
